fomod.Name: Fallout 4 Advanced AI System
fomod.Author: POINTYTHRUNDRA654
fomod.Description:
Advances Fallout 4's AI system for ALL entity types — creatures, humanoids, robots, synths, super mutants, and feral ghouls.
Features: - Enhanced creature pack behavior, ambush AI, and enrage states - Humanoid NPC squad tactics, morale system, and drug usage - Companion persistent memory — NPCs remember your conversations and actions - Robot/Synth precision targeting, self-repair, and special ability AI - Dynamic difficulty scaling based on player level - Detection overhaul — smarter sight, hearing, and stealth detection - Full MCM configuration (requires MCM Helper) - Mossy AI Bridge — connect Mossy desktop AI to monitor the mod live - Modder API — other mods can hook into the affinity and memory systems
Requirements: - Fallout 4 (latest version) - F4SE 0.6.23+ - Address Library for F4SE Plugins - MCM Helper (FallUI MCM) - (Optional) FallUI for enhanced in-game UI
